item.title: The Epstein files keep toppling the powerful. The latest: the man who runs Davos.
item.description: World Economic Forum leader Børge Brende announced his resignation Thursday, the latest casualty of the Epstein files fallout rocking business, politi...

item.title: Tech ratepayer pledge may be more bark than bite — but still matters
item.description: Big Tech's coming vow to pay for its own power amid the data center boom may be light on policy specifics. But it could still pack a political punch. ...

item.title: Republican revolt derails ICE detention facility plans

item.title: Wiles "in shock" over FBI phone-record subpoena
